description: summarize the local graph around a disease: associated genes, drugs, phenotypes, related diseases (read-only)
rules: read-only — never mutates the graph or any remote service
resolves DISEASE_NAME via the same substring search as search_nodes (node_type='disease') and takes the first match
buckets the matched disease's direct neighbors by neighbor type into associated_genes / associated_drugs / phenotypes / related_diseases
returns {"error": "Disease not found"} inside the context when no disease matches
writes the summary as JSON to record_store
usage: Set PRIMEKG_CSV (path to kg.csv) and DISEASE_NAME. Output: disease_context.json.
limitation: Uses the first substring match for the disease name; buckets only depth-1 neighbors. Requires pandas and a local PrimeKG kg.csv edge list.
